mapper.sql: SELECT id, project_name, project_key, app_name, app_version, status, description, allowed_origins, create_time, update_time FROM monitor_project
mapper.update: UPDATE monitor_project SET project_name = #{projectName}, app_name = #{appName}, app_version = #{appVersion}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, allowed_origins = #{allowedOrigins} WHERE id = #{id}
